figures.name: Mizraim
figures.title: Father of Egypt
figures.quote: The sons of Ham: Cush, Mizraim, Phut, and Canaan. — Genesis 10:6
figures.summary: Son of Ham whose descendants settled the Nile Delta, establishing Egypt.

figures.name: Cush
figures.title: Patriarch of Nubia
figures.quote: The sons of Ham: Cush, Mizraim, Phut, and Canaan. — Genesis 10:6
figures.summary: Son of Ham whose descendants settled south of Egypt in Nubia.

figures.name: Phut
figures.title: Patriarch of North Africa
figures.quote: The sons of Ham: Cush, Mizraim, Phut, and Canaan. — Genesis 10:6
figures.summary: Son of Ham whose descendants settled westward in Libya and North Africa.

figures.name: Taharqa
figures.title: Cushite Pharaoh
figures.quote: And the king heard concerning Tirhakah king of Ethiopia, 'He has come out to fight against you.' — 2 Kings 19:9
figures.summary: A powerful Cushite Pharaoh during the 25th Dynasty who challenged the Assyrian empire.
